api_errors.note: Telegram API polling healthy (HTTP 200, ~10s interval throughout window). Bot reinitialised at 14:06 UTC (normal getMe/setMyCommands/deleteWebhook sequence). Two sendMessage calls at 14:06:49 and 14:08:54. No Bybit exchange API calls visible (consistent with no trade activity). Historical: Telegram conflict Apr 19 (resolved); Bad Gateway May 7 (transient, resolved); BadRequest 'Message thread not found' May 8 (one-off, not recurring).

anomalies: CRITICAL — Anthropic API credit balance exhausted (BadRequestError 400, req_011Cau2Cn3Z4y895VAHouAt4): layer-1 automated health analysis is completely non-functional. All 10 check categories returned 'warn — layer-1 verdict unavailable'. Every future health run will produce the same result until credits are replenished. The automated monitoring layer is currently blind. Immediate operator action required.

FAIL — Pipeline smoke test exited rc=127: 'timeout: failed to run command python: No such file or directory'. The health check script invokes the bare python binary which is absent on this Ubuntu host (only python3 is installed). This is a health-check infrastructure defect — NOT a trading system failure. All four core trading processes are running normally. Fix: change smoke test invocation from python to python3 in the health check workflow/script.

WATCH — All four core processes (src.main, src.bot.claude_bridge, uvicorn src.web.api.main, src.bot.telegram_query_bot) show only ~3h 11m uptime at snapshot time despite VM uptime of 2d 3h 42m. A process restart occurred at approximately 11:00 UTC today. Root cause not visible in the snapshot; review systemd/supervisor/PM2 logs.
WATCH — tick=3 after approximately 3h on a 24/7 crypto exchange (bybit_2) is very low. Confirm this matches the expected cadence for the configured strategy timeframe.
WATCH — No monitoring or watchdog log files found anywhere in the snapshot. Cannot confirm these subsystems are active. If they exist, their logs are absent.
INFO — VM resources are healthy: disk 22% used (9.7G/45G), memory 365Mi available out of 956Mi, load average 0.03/0.08/0.04.

recommended_action: 1. IMMEDIATE: Replenish Anthropic API credits to restore automated layer-1 health analysis — the monitoring layer is currently non-functional. 2. Fix smoke test: update the health check workflow/script to invoke python3 instead of python (rc=127 will clear). 3. Investigate the process restart at ~11:00 UTC today — check systemd/supervisor/PM2 logs for restart cause and confirm clean recovery. 4. Verify tick=3 in 3h is the expected cadence for the configured strategy timeframe. 5. Check monitoring/watchdog subsystem status and confirm it is logging correctly.
